screen.mclaunch_home.preview.title: MC Launch Home
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.subtitle: A cinematic client home for official Minecraft.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.subtitle.li: Inspired by the launcher dashboard: sharper, moodier, more premium.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.callout: Goal: reshape the entry experience without patching Mojang's jar directly.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.copy.line1: Build a hero screen with stronger branding and cleaner hierarchy.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.copy.line2: Mirror the dashboard mood: dark surfaces, lime accents and premium contrast.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.copy.line3: Keep the official game intact while our client layer does the visual work.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.hero.title: MC Launch
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.hero.copy1: A more cinematic first impression for players who still launch official Minecraft.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.hero.copy2: Sharper panels. Stronger hierarchy. Launcher-grade identity inside the game.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.feature.her: Large-brand composition inspired by the launcher dashboard.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.feature.pan: Cards and side surfaces echo the launcher's tactical layout.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.feature.syn: Your launcher can rebuild this client layer and ship changes into the instance.
screen.mclaunch_home.preview.footer: Preview layer wired from MC Launch
